series_metadata.series_title: Public Record Files Underlying Formal Board Actions
series_metadata.series_description: This series is specific to the files containing records underlying formal disciplinary actions of the Board and deemed "public records." These files contain all publicly available information in the Board''s possession and documenting the activities of the Board culminating in a publicly-available action by the Board, including Orders, Consent Agreements, and Notices of Opportuniy for Hearing.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Paper documents scanned digital files (e.g., pdf) placement on Board server and back-up; paper may be destroyed staff determines integrity of digital file by viewing it; All paper files have been scanned and future files shall be scanned digital file as standard operating procedure and ease of storage. ; Electronic: digital file on Board server and back-up media held in secure place following death of licensee unless there is an order preserve file in excess of due pending legal action involving estate or file
